## What the License Allows

The MIT License is a permissive open-source license. It generally allows the following, subject to the full license text:

- **Use:** Free to use the software for any purpose, including academic and research use
- **Copy:** Free to copy the software
- **Modify:** Free to modify the software
- **Distribute:** Free to distribute original or modified versions
- **Sublicense:** Permitted
- **Private use:** Permitted
- **Commercial use:** Permitted

> Always refer to the full original license text for authoritative terms: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView/blob/main/LICENSE

---

## Attribution Requirements

The MIT License requires the following when copying or distributing RuView code:

1. **Include the original copyright notice** in all copies or substantial portions
2. **Include the full MIT License text** in all copies or substantial portions
3. **Attribute authorship** to the original RuView authors (ruvnet and contributors)

The MIT License does **not** require:
- Payment of royalties
- Sharing modifications under the same license (no copyleft requirement)
- Approval from the original authors

---

## How This Repository Uses RuView

At the time of this document, this repository (`wifi-csi-fall-detection`) uses RuView in the following limited ways:

| Use Type | Details |
|---|---|
| Documentation reference | RuView is documented as a third-party reference project |
| Submodule (planned) | A Git submodule pointer to the original RuView repo is recommended (no code copied) |
| Experiment planning | An offline evaluation plan is documented in `experiments/ruview_adversarial_evaluation/` |
| Code copy status | **No RuView code has been copied** into this repository at this time |

If any RuView code is later copied or included (e.g., as a snapshot), the original MIT License text must be preserved and the original attribution must be maintained.

---

## Notes

- This repository does **not** claim ownership of RuView or any of its components.
- RuView's claims and outputs are **not independently validated** in this repository.
- If the RuView project changes its license in the future, this summary should be updated accordingly.
- If a snapshot copy is ever added, place it in `third_party/wifi_sensing/ruview/RuView_snapshot/` and include the full original license text, source URL, and commit hash.
